emails.subject: RTP project
emails.body: John and Krishna, I am sending you an outline of a conference at Stanford on topics related to demand-side pricing and management in the power markets. Please, let me know if you are personally interested and who else in your respective organizations would like to attend. Vince Forwarded by Vince J Kaminski/HOU/ECT on 03/19/2001 08:10 AM Hill Huntington <hillh@stanford.edu> on 03/15/2001 05:26:55 PM
